android.view.ViewGroup.text: Ma E Rissa
android.view.ViewGroup.content-desc: Ma E Rissa
android.view.ViewGroup.heading: false

android.view.ViewGroup.text: I love that they are offering a reward but I’m pissed we even have to do that for people to talk
android.view.ViewGroup.content-desc: I love that they are offering a reward but I’m pissed we even have to do that for people to talk
android.view.ViewGroup.heading: false

android.view.ViewGroup.text: Jen Gonzalez
android.view.ViewGroup.content-desc: Jen Gonzalez
android.view.ViewGroup.heading: false

android.view.ViewGroup.text: So yes, there are laws in place and penalties, but you have to prove it, which is often very difficult. And there’s nobody enforcing Ty he laws .
android.view.ViewGroup.content-desc: So yes, there are laws in place and penalties, but you have to prove it, which is often very difficult. And there’s nobody enforcing Ty he laws .
android.view.ViewGroup.heading: false
